mapper.insert: INSERT INTO play_history (id, user_id, story_id, duration_listened, created_at) VALUES (REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), #{userId}, #{storyId}, #{durationListened}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT ph.id, ph.user_id as userId, ph.story_id as storyId, ph.duration_listened as durationListened, ph.created_at as createdAt, s.title, s.icon, s.duration FROM play_history ph INNER JOIN stories s ON ph.story_id = s.id WHERE ph.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ph.created_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, SUM(duration_listened) as totalSeconds, COUNT(DISTINCT story_id) as storyCount FROM play_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(created_at)) FROM play_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
